name: IIT Hyderabad – Senior Project Manager – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Project Manager. Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Hyderabad official website https://iith.ac.in/.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager Recruitment 2026.
